gaps.description: Single-file architecture: src/index.ts is 978 lines — approaching the 1000-line refactor trigger documented in ARCHITECTURE.md. Not yet violated but close to threshold.

Pipe error propagation: architecture says 'if left command fails, right command receives empty stdin (short-circuit behavior)' — implementation short-circuits on error output from left segment (lines 172-175). Behavior matches but edge cases around error detection via string matching could diverge from documented contract.

Constructor only accepts (fs) parameter — some tests pass { readOnly: true } as second arg which is silently ignored. The readOnly property is read from fs.readOnly, not from constructor options. Minor API surface mismatch.
grep case-insensitive multi-file bypass path manually reads files rather than using fs.grep — not documented in architecture performance considerations section.
mkdir fallback workaround (write path+'/.keep') is implemented in mkdirOne() as documented.
